testcase.name: document_actuator_metrics
testcase.system-out:
[DAY 37] HIKARICP ACTUATOR METRICS: Add spring-boot-actuator dependency to expose: GET /actuator/metrics/hikaricp.connections.active GET /actuator/metrics/hikaricp.connections.idle GET /actuator/metrics/hikaricp.connections.pending ← ALERT if > 0 GET /actuator/metrics/hikaricp.connections.timeout ← CRITICAL if > 0 GET /actuator/metrics/hikaricp.connections.acquire ← histogram
[DAY 37] SIZING ANTI-PATTERNS: ✗ maximumPoolSize=100 (too large, causes DB thrashing) ✗ minimumIdle=0 (cold start latency on every burst) ✓ maximumPoolSize=10 (for 4-core server + SSD DB) ✓ minimumIdle=2 (keep 2 warm, grow up to 10 under load)

testcase.name: recommended_pool_size_formula
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-04T23:29:10.816+05:30 INFO 99102 --- [phase2-data] [ main] .t.p.d.Day37PoolSizing$PoolSizingAdvisor : [Day37] Recommended pool size: cores=4, spindles=1, recommended=9 [DAY 37] Formula: (cores * 2) + spindles = recommended [DAY 37] 4 cores + 1 SSD = 9 connections recommended
